title: अग्नि गायत्री
devanagariText:
॥ श्री अग्नि गायत्री ॥

ॐ महाज्वालाय विद्महे वैश्वानराय धीमहि।
तन्नो अग्निः प्रचोदयात्॥

ॐ सप्तजिह्वाय विद्महे हव्यवाहनाय धीमहि।
तन्नो अग्निः प्रचोदयात्॥

ॐ पावकाय विद्महे हुताशनाय धीमहि।
तन्नो अग्निः प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ इति श्री अग्नि गायत्री सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Agni Gayatri ||

Om Mahajwalaya Vidmahe Vaishvanaraya Dhimahi.
Tanno Agnih Prachodayat.

Om Saptajihvaya Vidmahe Havyavahanaya Dhimahi.
Tanno Agnih Prachodayat.

Om Pavakaya Vidmahe Hutashanaya Dhimahi.
Tanno Agnih Prachodayat.

|| Iti Shri Agni Gayatri Sampoornam ||
hindiMeaning: हम महाज्वाला वाले, वैश्वानर (सर्वव्यापी अग्नि) का ध्यान करते हैं, अग्निदेव हमारी बुद्धि को सन्मार्ग पर प्रेरित करें। हम सप्त जिह्वाओं वाले, हव्य को देवताओं तक पहुँचाने वाले अग्नि का ध्यान करते हैं। हम पावक (पवित्र करने वाले), हुताशन (हवि भक्षक) अग्निदेव का ध्यान करते हैं, वे हमें प्रेरणा प्रदान करें।
benefits: Invokes the divine blessings of Agni Deva
Purifies the mind, body, and environment
Enhances digestive fire and physical vitality
Brings success in yagya, havan, and sacred rituals
Removes impurities and burns away accumulated sins
description: Dedicated to Lord Agni, the Agni Gayatri (अग्नि गायत्री) is a powerful Vedic meditation mantra revered in Hindu tradition. Drawn from Rig Veda, this text has been cherished by devotees for centuries. Regular recitation is believed to invoke the divine blessings of Agni Deva, remove impurities and burns away accumulated sins, and enhance digestive fire and physical vitality. This prayer is traditionally recited on Sunday (Ravivar) to invoke divine grace. The text contains 3 verses and takes around 2 minutes to recite, fitting conveniently into a daily spiritual routine. On this page, you can read the complete Agni Gayatri in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Agni Gayatri Mantra in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Invoke Agni Deva's blessings for purification, vitality, and success in sacred rituals.
